channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Bob Carr Reflects on Love, Loss and Life After Helena’s Passing
item.description: Bob Carr, former NSW premier and Australian foreign minister, opens up about the profound grief he experienced after the sudden death of his wife, Helena, from an aneurism in October 2023. Their five-...

item.title: UPSC CSE 2025 Results Declared; Gulf Energy Exports at Risk Amid US-Iran Tensions
item.description: The Union Public Service Commission (UPSC) has officially declared the final results for the Civil Services Examination 2025, recommending 958 candidates for appointments in IAS, IFS, IPS, and other c...

item.title: Man receives whole life prison sentence for murdering woman and her three children in Bradford house fire
item.description: Sharaz Ali, aged 40, has been sentenced to a whole life order at Doncaster Crown Court, meaning he will never be released from prison. He was convicted in December 2025 of murdering Bryonie Gawith, 29...

item.title: Former UK diplomat claims Foreign Office ignored warnings of impending US-Israeli strikes on Iran
item.description: A former British diplomat, Ameer Kotecha, who recently resigned from the Foreign Office, has claimed that the UK's ambassador in Israel, Simon Walters, warned London weeks in advance that an attack on...

item.title: Trump Replaces Interior Secretary Kristi Noem Amid Controversy Over Immigration Policy and Misconduct
item.description: On March 6, 2026, former South Dakota Governor and U.S. Secretary of the Interior Kristi Noem was dismissed by President Trump due to widespread criticism over her role in harsh immigration enforcemen...

item.title: Former Free Britney Advocate Questions End of Spears' Conservatorship Following DUI Arrest
item.description: A former advocate of the #FreeBritney movement has expressed regret over the campaign to end Britney Spears' conservatorship, following the singer's recent arrest for driving under the influence (DUI)...

item.title: Government Suspends Ariana Co for Delays in Eyasi Dam Construction
item.description: Arusha: Tanzania Prime Minister Mwigulu Nchemba has taken stern action against Tunnel Sadd Ariana Company, the contractor responsible for building the Eyasi Dam in Karatu District, Arusha Region. The ...

item.title: Impact of Middle East Tensions on Australian Fuel and Energy Costs
item.description: The ongoing conflict in Iran has caused disruptions in global energy markets, particularly affecting the Strait of Hormuz, a key oil shipping route. This has led to a roughly 10% increase in global cr...

item.title: Second UK government charter flight departs Oman to repatriate British nationals from the Middle East
item.description: The UK government has confirmed that a second charter flight for British nationals has departed from Muscat, Oman's capital, to bring stranded citizens home amid escalating conflict in the Middle East...

item.title: Franco Pepe Shares Handmade Pizza Dough Recipe and Three Signature Creations in New Book Feature
item.description: Franco Pepe, a renowned Italian pizzaiolo and founder of Pepe in Grani in Caiazzo, Campania, is celebrated as one of the world's top pizza chefs. After topping the Best Pizza Awards for two years, he ...

item.title: HONOR recognised at MWC 2026 for robotics and foldable tech innovations
item.description: At MWC 2026, HONOR garnered significant acclaim, winning over 70 media awards for its advances in AI and hardware across robotics, foldable devices, and its expanding AI ecosystem. The company present...

item.title: Kenya Airways Halts Dubai Repatriation Flights Following Safety Advisory
item.description: Kenya Airways has paused its repatriation flights to and from Dubai after getting advice from Dubai airport authorities due to security concerns. The airline stressed that safety of both crew and pass...

item.title: Seven Solid Reasons Women Should Express Romantic Interest First
item.description: This article dey encourage women make dem no dey fear to shoot their shot – that is, to tell person wey dem like say dem like am, instead of to dey wait for the guy to make first move. The writer, Glo...

item.title: India and New Zealand Prepare for Tense T20 World Cup Final
item.description: India will take on New Zealand on Sunday in Ahmedabad, aiming to become the first team to win the T20 World Cup three times. The Indian side is under immense pressure, not only from 100,000-plus fans ...

item.title: President Marcos expresses solidarity with UAE and confidence in safety of Filipinos during phone call with UAE President amid Middle East tensions
item.description: President Ferdinand 'Bongbong' Marcos Jr. held a telephone conversation on Friday, March 6, 2026, with United Arab Emirates (UAE) President Sheikh Mohamed bin Zayed Al Nahyan. During the call, Preside...

item.title: Testimonies Honouring Kenyan Women as Mothers, Mentors, Sisters and Friends
item.description: This Nation Africa article shares heartfelt testimonies from Kenyans about influential women in their lives. It highlights how these women have shaped others as mothers, mentors, sisters, and friends ...

item.title: Maritime Police College supports children with special needs on Women’s Day
item.description: In Mwanza, Tanzania, the Tanzania Maritime Police College has been actively engaging with the local community as part of International Women’s Day activities. The college’s Women Police Network, led b...

item.title: Jaylen Brown Rejects Beverly Hills Apology Amid Renewed Claims of Racial Profiling in Police Practices
item.description: Boston Celtics star Jaylen Brown rejected an apology from the city of Beverly Hills after police shut down his private invite-only brand event for 741 Performance during NBA All-Star Weekend on Februa...

item.title: Kenya Court Rules Parts of Cybercrime Law Unconstitutional Over Vagueness
item.description: The Court of Appeal of Kenya has declared Sections 22 and 23 of the Computer Misuse and Cybercrimes Act unconstitutional. The bench, consisting of Judges Korir Weldon Kipyegon, Aggrey Muchelule, and P...

item.title: Jumbo Mall opening in eMalahleni to create jobs and support local businesses
item.description: The upcoming Jumbo Mall in eMalahleni, Mpumalanga, is poised to become a major economic driver for the city. Developed by New Africa Developments (NAD), the 37,000m² shopping centre will host over 100...
